overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V (with Paris mod) showing a character walking around the Eiffel Tower area. The character traverses sandy plaza grounds, crosses asphalt roads, and explores the tower base on a bright sunny day with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy plaza with stone monuments near Eiffel Tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the sandy Champ de Mars plaza toward the Eiffel Tower, passing stone monuments on the right

entered.detail: large iron lattice tower dominating the skyline ahead
tall stone sculptural monument with abstract shapes
flat sandy ground surface of the plaza
green tree line visible in the distance beyond the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the open sandy plaza of Champ de Mars with the Eiffel Tower looming ahead. Stone monuments line the right side while sparse trees dot the distant edges under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: asphalt road with crosswalk approaching tree line

events.description: steps from sandy plaza onto asphalt road surface with painted crosswalk markings
crossing the white striped pedestrian crosswalk on the asphalt road

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt road via the pedestrian crosswalk and continuing to walk away from the tower toward the tree-lined area

entered.detail: dark gray asphalt road surface with white painted lines
white parallel stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
dense line of green trees marking the edge of the open area
white commercial van parked on the side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from sand to asphalt, crossing a marked pedestrian crosswalk while moving away from the Eiffel Tower. The tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the character approaches a tree-lined area with a white van visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open asphalt area with parked van and trees

events.description: character stops walking away from tower and executes a 180-degree turn to face back toward the Eiffel Tower

agents.ego_description: stops at the crosswalk area, turns around to face the tower, and begins walking back toward the Eiffel Tower

notable_agents.action: white van parked stationary on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: After reaching the crosswalk, the character pivots to face the Eiffel Tower again and begins the return walk. The white van remains visible on the left as the tower shifts back to the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: path along Eiffel Tower base with concrete barriers

events.description: enters the immediate tower base area with concrete structural barriers and fencing

agents.ego_description: walking along the base of the Eiffel Tower next to concrete barriers and metal fencing

entered.detail: large concrete structural barriers with arched openings at the tower base
green metal security fencing running along the tower perimeter
massive iron support legs of the Eiffel Tower structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the immediate base of the Eiffel Tower, passing massive concrete barriers and metal fencing. The tower now dominates the right side of the frame at close range as the character follows the perimeter path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across the Champ de Mars, transitioning from an open plaza to the immediate industrial perimeter of the Eiffel Tower. It begins with the character walking across a wide sandy plaza toward the looming tower, passing stone monuments under a bright, clear sky. As the terrain shifts from sand to asphalt, the camera moves across a pedestrian crosswalk and away from the landmark, momentarily framing the tower to the left beside a distant white van. The scene then pivots as the character turns back, bringing the tower back to the center of the view while moving toward its base. Finally, the perspective shifts to a close-range view as the character follows the perimeter path, passing massive concrete barriers and metal fencing with the tower dominating the right side of the frame.
